Vectorless RAG
==============

Structure-first document indexing without a vector database. This lead paragraph
is not a heading, and this sentence keeps it well over the length limit anyway.

1. Background

Embeddings and vector stores add cost and infrastructure to retrieval. Note that
1. this numbered list item is a full sentence and must not become a heading.

1.1 Prior Work

PageIndex reconstructs a document structure with hundreds of LLM calls, reading
none of the structure the file already contains.

METHODOLOGY

We read the embedded outline first, then typography, then an LLM only for what is
genuinely ambiguous. NASA and IBM are acronyms in this body line, not a heading.

Chapter 4: Conclusion

Documents already carry their structure; reading it is exact, instant, and free.
